description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3.6 Docker image. Define a before_script that runs `pip install twine` and `python setup.py sdist`. Add a production job in the deploy stage that only runs on the master branch, executes `apt-get update -qy`, `apt-get install -y ruby-dev`, `gem install dpl`, `dpl --provider=heroku --app=novamud --api-key=$HEROKU_PRODUCTION_API_KEY`, and `twine upload dist/*`. Set the job type to deploy and provide the variables TWINE_USERNAME and TWINE_PASSWORD from the CI environment. No caches or artifacts are defined.
